seo.title: Contact Us - PDFTool.work
seo.description: Get in touch with the PDFTool.work team for support, partnerships, or feedback.

lead: We typically respond within 1 business day.

strings.heroLead: Have questions or feedback? We typically respond within 1 business day.
strings.emailIntro: We typically respond within 1 business day.
strings.whatWeHelpIntro: Here are the areas we can assist with:
strings.whatWeHelpNote: We protect your privacy and never use your contact info for marketing.
strings.faqResponseAnswer: Typically within 1 business day, slightly longer on holidays.
strings.faqSensitiveAnswer: Not recommended via email. Our tools process files locally in your browser without uploading to servers.
